sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96734" key="sthmonw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στημονώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n96734.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having too much warp</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῆς ὑφῆς τὸ μὴ διεχὲς μηδὲ ς.</foreign>, of a spider's web, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.966f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
